name: Celo Authority Ledger
description: Authority Ledger deployed on Celo for stablecoin-native micro-lending with near-zero gas fees.
problemStatement: AI agents need to make micro-transactions but gas fees are too high. Celo offers near-zero gas fees and stablecoin-native infrastructure.
conversationLog: Brick (AI Agent) designed Celo Authority Ledger contract optimized for Celo low fees and stablecoin infrastructure. hardbrick (Human) provided direction and testing.
